messages.text: Ready. I will use my tools autonomously to complete your request without asking for permission.

## Agents

| ID | Name | Description | Model | Tools |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `bug-hunter` | Bug Hunter | Searches for likely bugs and summarizes findings. | gpt-5.2-codex-xhigh | readFile, searchCode, getDiagnostics, glob, listDir, lsp |
| `planner` | Planner | Chooses plan-small or plan-large based on bug count and writes the plan. | gpt-5.2-codex-xhigh | all |
| `implementer` | Implementer | Executes the plan using implement-plan. | ollama:qwen3.5-397b-cloud | all |
| `_default` | Default | General-purpose coding assistant | - | all |

Use `/agent <id>` to switch agent for the session.
